---
title: Keyboard
date: 2023-01-01
date-modified: last-modified
title-block-banner: "#212529"
published-title: Last updated
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Contents"
---

<!-- ![](keyboard.jpg) -->

# Zsh/Bash



| Command                        | Description                                                        |
| ------------------             |  ---------------------------                                       |
| `Ctrl` + `A`                   | Move the cursor to the beginning of the line                       |
|`Ctrl` + `E`                    | Move the cursor to the end of the line                             |
|`Opt` + `←`                     | Move the cursor one word backward                                  |
|`Opt` + `→`                     | Move the cursor one word forward                                   |
|`←`                             | Move the cursor one character backward                             |
|`→`                             | Move the cursor one character forward                              |
|`Ctrl` + `U`                    | Delete the current line                                            |
|`Ctrl` + `K`                    | Delete from the cursor to the end of the line                      |
|`Ctrl` + `L`                    | Clear the screen                                                   |
|`Ctrl` + `W`                    | Delete one word backward                                           |
|`Ctrl` + `D`                    | Delete one character forward                                       |
|`Fn` + `Backspace`              | Delete one character forward                                       |
|`Backspace`                     | Delete one character backward                                      |
|`Ctrl` + `_`                    | Undo the last change                                               |
|`Ctrl` + `C`                    | Terminate the running foreground process                           |
|`Ctrl` + `Z`                    | Suspend the running foreground process                             |
|`Ctrl` + `D`                    | Exit current shell                                                 |
|`↑`                             | Recall the previous command in history                             |
|`↓`                             | Recall the next command in history                                 |
|`Ctrl` + `R`                    | Search the command history                                         |
|`Ctrl` + `G`                    | Escape from command search mode                                    |
|`!!`                            | Execute the last typed command                                     |
|`!pw`                           | Execute the last command in history that begins with pw            |
|`TAB`                           | Auto-complete the typed command                                    |
|`TAB` `TAB`                     | Show list of commands                                              |
|`TAB` `TAB` `TAB` `...`         | Cycle through matched commands                                     |




# VSCode


| Mac                            | Windows                       | Description                        |
| -------------------------      | ---------------------------   | ------------------                 |
| `Cmd` + `Shift` + `P`          | `Ctrl` + `Shift` + `P`        | Command Palette                    |
| `Cmd` + `,`                    | `Ctrl` + `,`                  | Open settings                      |
| `Cmd` + `K`   `Cmd` + `S`      | `Ctrl` + `K`   `Ctrl` + `S`   | Keyboard shoutcuts                 |
| `Cmd` + `B`                    | `Ctrl` + `B`                  | Toggle sidebar                     |
| `Cmd` + `Shift` + `N`          | `Ctrl` + `Shift` + `N`        | Open new window                    |
| `Cmd` + `Shift` + `W`          | `Ctrl` + `Shift` + `W`        | Close window                       |
| `Cmd` + `W`                    | `Ctrl` + `W`                  | Close tab                          |
| `Cmd` + `J`                    | `Ctrl`  + `J`                 | Open the terminal                  |
| `Cmd` + `\`                    | `Ctrl` + \                    | Split view                         |
| `Cmd` + `Shift` + `Tab`        | `Ctrl` + `Shift` + `Tab`      | Navigate tabs                      |
| `Cmd` + `1` / `2` / `3`        | `Ctrl` + `1` / `2` / `3`      | Navigate tab groups                |
| `Cmd` + `Opt` + `↑` / `↓`      | `Ctrl` + `Opt` + `↑` / `↓`    | Multiple cursor                    |
| `Cmd` + `Shift` + `↑` / `↓`    | `Ctrl` + `Shift` + `↑` / `↓`  | Select text                        |
| `Opt` + `↑` / `↓`              | `Alt` + `↑` / `↓`             | Move the line Up / Down            |
| `Shift` + `Opt` + `↑` / `↓`    | `Shift` + `Alt` + `↑` / `↓`   | Copy line Up / Down                |
| `Cmd` + `D`                    | `Ctrl` + `D`                  | Select word                        |
| `Cmd` + `L`                    | `Ctrl` + `L`                  | Select current line                |
| `Cmd` + `Shift` + `L`          | `Ctrl` + `Shift` + `L`        | Select similar occurrences         |
| `Cmd` + `Shift` + `K`          | `Ctrl` + `Shift` + `K`        | Delete current line                |
| `Cmd` + `Backspace`            | `Ctrl` + `Backspace`          | Delete one word backward           |
| `Opt` + `Backspace`            | `Alt` + `Backspace`           | Delete one word backward           |
| `Cmd` + `/`                    | `Ctrl` + `/`                  | Comment lines                      |
| `Cmd` + `G`                    | `Ctrl` + `G`                  | Navigate to  line                  |
| `Cmd` + `Opt` + `[`  /  `]`    | `Ctrl` + `Shift` + `[` / `]`  | Code folding                       |
| `Cmd` + `[`  /  `]`            | `Ctrl` + `[`  /  `]`          | Indent / outdent lines             |
| `Cmd` + `K`   `Cmd` + `F`      | `Ctrl` + `K`   `Ctrl` + `F`   | Format selected code               |
| `Shift` + `Opt` + `F`          | `Shift` + `Alt` + `F`         | Format document                    |
| `Opt` + `←` / `→`              | `Alt` + `←` / `→`             | Go to the start / end of the word  |
| `Cmd` + `←` / `→`              | `Ctrl` + `←` / `→`            | Go to the start / end of the line  |
| `Cmd` + `↑` / `↓`              | `Ctrl` + `↑` / `↓`            | Go to beginning or end of file     |
| `Cmd` + `Shift` + `F`          | `Ctrl` + `Shift` + `F`        | Search files                       |
| `Cmd` + `F`                    | `Ctrl` + `F`                  | Find text                          |
| `Cmd` + `Opt` + `F`            | `Ctrl` + `H`                  | Replace text                       |
